742 GG0170O2_12_STP_GOAL_CD GG0170O2_12_STP_GOAL_CD GG0170O2 12 Stp Goal Indicato CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's goal to go up and down 12 steps with or without a rail by the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
